action_boundary: Should access request AR-201 for AP invoice entry be approved for user U-14?
communication_boundary: Evaluate role combinations through the segregation-of-duties matrix.

documents.text: Access request AR-201 asks to add role AP-INVOICE-ENTRY for user U-14.
Entitlement extract ENT-U14 shows user U-14 currently holds AP-REPORT-VIEW.
Segregation matrix SOD-AP permits the pair AP-INVOICE-ENTRY plus AP-REPORT-VIEW and prohibits the pair AP-INVOICE-ENTRY plus AP-PAYMENT-RELEASE.
Manager approval MGR-AR201 approves AP-INVOICE-ENTRY for user U-14.
Access approval requires checking the requested role against existing roles in the segregation matrix.
